description:
Blocked until the agreed fixture surface is covered by fz2 matrix paths or explicitly declared out of scope, and until fz-rh2.15 removes the remaining legacy extern semantic payload substrate.

Only after that, identify old-world modules, docs, tests, and CLI fallback surfaces that can be deleted. No deletion tickets should be filed before the coverage decision is factual.

Signal: a deletion DAG with one ticket per removable subsystem, each backed by fz2 matrix coverage or explicit out-of-scope documentation.
title: Plan old fz compiler deletion after fz2 fixture contract coverage
